title: Transfer of ownership by merchant
doc_html:
Art. 520. Transfer of ownership by merchant

            Except as otherwise provided by legislation, a transferee in good faith and for fair value acquires ownership of a corporeal movable from a transferor who is not the owner only if the transferor has possession of the thing with consent of the owner, is a merchant customarily selling similar things, and transfers the thing in the regular course of the transferor's business.

            Acts 2023, No. 401, §1.
doc_text:
Art. 520.  Transfer of ownership by merchant
Except as otherwise provided by legislation, a transferee in good faith and for fair
value acquires ownership of a corporeal movable from a transferor who is not the owner only
if the transferor has possession of the thing with consent of the owner, is a merchant
customarily selling similar things, and transfers the thing in the regular course of the
transferor's business.
Acts 2023, No. 401, §1.
